visit_summary: Avoid this trip; the shopping cart has visible damage and is likely incomplete.
alignment_summary: The seller claims the item is in 'fair condition' and 'clean,' but the photo shows significant damage and wear.

mismatches.issue: Visible damage contradicts claims of fair and clean condition.

reasons.text: Visible crack or stress mark on the blue plastic base near the front wheel.
The item appears to be a toy shopping cart, but no accessories or other parts are shown, suggesting it may be incomplete.
The seller states the item is in 'fair condition' and 'clean,' which is contradicted by the visible damage and wear in the photo.
